allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./package.json''\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const antd=Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(''antd''\)||k.includes\(''@ant-design''\)\); console.log\(''Ant Design packages:'', antd.length ? antd : ''none''\); console.log\(''Tailwind:'', deps[''tailwindcss''] || ''missing''\); console.log\(''shadcn radix count:'', Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k=>k.startsWith\(''@radix-ui''\)\).length\);")
